subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: Compliance with C1P5 for pipe sizing is verified for the plumbing design when—

ol.li: fully vented systems and fully vented modified systems are designed in accordance with Section 8 of AS/NZS 3500.2: and
single stack systems and single stack modified systems are designed in accordance with Section 9 of AS/NZS 3500.2: and
consideration by the designer is given to expanding the exclusion zones referenced in AS/NZS 3500.2 (1 m exclusion zone at the base of the stack) for high rise buildings.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: For the purposes of (1), for each pipework section, the probable simultaneous wastewater flowrate determined through C1V1 may be converted to an equivalent AS/NZS 3500.2 Fixture Unit (FU) MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahGart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaaiikaiaadA eacaWGvbGaaiykaaaa@38F6@ R0lGODlhKAAVAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAKAAVAAACUYSPqcvtD6OcKqCAswV6c8xB3jGWFemM6Gqo IXsmnurSjPvmbXwteCfjwYY5W1BInB17yN2y+fM9kTgd8wO6aW6NKmUK/l67Ymn5jE6r12xIAQAh /wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMdgFAQAHCERTTVQ3AAETV2luQWxsQmFzaWNDb2RlUGFnZXMAEQVUaW1lcyBO ZXcgUm9tYW4AEQNTeW1ib2wAEQVDb3VyaWVyIE5ldwARBE1UIEV4dHJhABIACCEvRY9EL0FQ9BAP R19BUPIfHkFQ9BUPQQD0RfQl9I9CX0EA9BAPQ19BAPSPRfQqX0j0j0EA9BAPQPSPQX9I9BAPQSpf RF9F9F9F9F9BDwwBAAEAAQICAgIAAgABAQEAAwABAAQAAAoBAAIAgigAAgCDRgACAINVAAIAgikA AAAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDP/PD94bWwgdmVyc2lvbj0iMS4wIj8+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBUcmFu c2xhdG9yQDVANUBNYXRoTUwyIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpLnRkbEBNYXRoTUwgMi4wIChDbGlwYm9hcmQp QCAtLT48bWF0aCB4bWxucz0naHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMTk5OC9NYXRoL01hdGhNTCc+PG1y b3c+PG1vIHN0cmV0Y2h5PSdmYWxzZSc+KDwvbW8+PG1pPkY8L21pPjxtaT5VPC9taT48bW8gc3Ry ZXRjaHk9J2ZhbHNlJz4pPC9tbz48L21yb3c+PC9tYXRoPjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5D3BlQEVuZEA1QDVA IC0tPgAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMgYGAAAAAAAAOw== in accordance with the following:

ol.li: Q MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahGart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamyuaaaa@36CE@ R0lGODlhEAAVAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAEAAVAAACJoSPqcvtAYMD8tR1Ld4q6+R9SEhxoCmCF/RE U/karkyubIzn+lQAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAxyQUBAAcIRFNNVDcAARNXaW5BbGxCYXNpY0NvZGVQ YWdlcwARBVRpbWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJpZXIgTmV3ABEETVQgRXh0cmEA EgAIIS9Fj0QvQVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0EA9DX0EA9I9F9CpfSPSPQQD0 EA9A9I9Bf0j0EA9BKl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgACAAEBAQADAAEABAAACgEAAgCDUQAA AAAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwM8E8P3htbCB2ZXJzaW9uPSIxLjAiPz48IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQFRyYW5z bGF0b3JANUA1QE1hdGhNTDIgKENsaXBib2FyZCkudGRsQE1hdGhNTCAyLjAgKENsaXBib2FyZClA IC0tPjxtYXRoIHhtbG5zPSdodHRwOi8vd3d3LnczLm9yZy8xOTk4L01hdGgvTWF0aE1MJz48bWk+ UTwvbWk+PC9tYXRoPjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVARW5kQDVANUAgLS0+ACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAyBgYA AAAAAAA7 = the wastewater flowrate (L/s); and

FU MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahGart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamOraiaadw faaaa@379D@ R0lGODlhHQASAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAHQASAAACNYSPqcvtD6OcJtgb6kW75fNVSrh8Jjg+Z0KK Dpayr8vFHo3KM9MCfe0h/UCWF4yCTCqXTEgBACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAxzgUBAAcIRFNNVDcAARNX aW5BbGxCYXNpY0NvZGVQYWdlcwARBVRpbWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJpZXIg TmV3ABEETVQgRXh0cmEAEgAIIS9Fj0QvQVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0EA9D X0EA9I9F9CpfSPSPQQD0EA9A9I9Bf0j0EA9BKl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgACAAEBAQAD AAEABAAACgEAAgCDRgACAINVAAAAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAz2Dw/eG1sIHZlcnNpb249IjEuMCI/ PjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVAVHJhbnNsYXRvckA1QDVATWF0aE1MMiAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKS50ZGxATWF0 aE1MIDIuMCAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKUAgLS0+PG1hdGggeG1sbnM9J2h0dHA6Ly93d3cudzMub3JnLzE5 OTgvTWF0aC9NYXRoTUwnPjxtcm93PjxtaT5GPC9taT48bWk+VTwvbWk+PC9tcm93PjwvbWF0aD48 IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQEVuZEA1QDVAIC0tPgAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMgYEAAAAAAAAOw== = the equivalent fixture units converted from a flowrate (dimensionless) where the result is rounded up to the next integer.

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: For the purposes of (1), all relevant sizing tables and design guidance referencing FU MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahGart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaamOraiaadw faaaa@379D@ R0lGODlhHQASAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAHQASAAACNYSPqcvtD6OcJtgb6kW75fNVSrh8Jjg+Z0KK Dpayr8vFHo3KM9MCfe0h/UCWF4yCTCqXTEgBACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAxzgUBAAcIRFNNVDcAARNX aW5BbGxCYXNpY0NvZGVQYWdlcwARBVRpbWVzIE5ldyBSb21hbgARA1N5bWJvbAARBUNvdXJpZXIg TmV3ABEETVQgRXh0cmEAEgAIIS9Fj0QvQVD0EA9HX0FQ8h8eQVD0FQ9BAPRF9CX0j0JfQQD0EA9D X0EA9I9F9CpfSPSPQQD0EA9A9I9Bf0j0EA9BKl9EX0X0X0X0X0EPDAEAAQABAgICAgACAAEBAQAD AAEABAAACgEAAgCDRgACAINVAAAAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAz2Dw/eG1sIHZlcnNpb249IjEuMCI/ PjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVAVHJhbnNsYXRvckA1QDVATWF0aE1MMiAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKS50ZGxATWF0 aE1MIDIuMCAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKUAgLS0+PG1hdGggeG1sbnM9J2h0dHA6Ly93d3cudzMub3JnLzE5 OTgvTWF0aC9NYXRoTUwnPjxtcm93PjxtaT5GPC9taT48bWk+VTwvbWk+PC9tcm93PjwvbWF0aD48 IS0tIE1hdGhUeXBlQEVuZEA1QDVAIC0tPgAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMgYEAAAAAAAAOw== in AS/NZS 3500.2 may alternatively be converted to an equivalent flowrate using the following:

subclause.title: SubClause
subclause.p: In the equation shown at (4), ΣFU MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahGart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaeu4OdmvcKb ay=laadAeacaWGvbaaaa@3AED@ R0lGODlhHAARAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAHAARAAACNoSPqcvtGKKMzwV4K8uHa+V9FjhJgLktHGWE iXvG6wObc+Nll97hWAsBbkoU1IklSiqXzGalAAAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMdkFAQAHCERTTVQ3AAET V2luQWxsQmFzaWNDb2RlUGFnZXMAEQVUaW1lcyBOZXcgUm9tYW4AEQNTeW1ib2wAEQVDb3VyaWVy IE5ldwARBE1UIEV4dHJhABIACCEvRY9EL0FQ9BAPR19BUPIfHkFQ9BUPQQD0RfQl9I9CX0EA9BAP Q19BAPSPRfQqX0j0j0EA9BAPQPSPQX9I9BAPQSpfRF9F9F9F9F9BDwwBAAEAAQICAgIAAgABAQEA AwABAAQAAAoBAAIEhaMDUwlkAGD/AgCDRgACAINVAAAAACH/C01hdGhUeXBlMDAz6Tw/eG1sIHZl cnNpb249IjEuMCI/PjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVAVHJhbnNsYXRvckA1QDVATWF0aE1MMiAoQ2xpcGJv YXJkKS50ZGxATWF0aE1MIDIuMCAoQ2xpcGJvYXJkKUAgLS0+PG1hdGggeG1sbnM9J2h0dHA6Ly93 d3cudzMub3JnLzE5OTgvTWF0aC9NYXRoTUwnPjxtcm93PjxtaT4mI3gwM0EzOzwvbWk+PG1pPkY8 L21pPjxtaT5VPC9taT48L21yb3c+PC9tYXRoPjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5cGVARW5kQDVANUAgLS0+ACH/ C01hdGhUeXBlMDAyBgQAAAAAAAA7 = the sum of fixture units to be converted (dimensionless).

callout.p: The conversion of the probable simultaneous wastewater flowrate into fixture units (FU) MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahGart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaaiikaiaadA eacaWGvbGaaiykaaaa@38F6@ R0lGODlhKAAVAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAKAAVAAACUYSPqcvtD6OcKqCAswV6c8xB3jGWFemM6Gqo IXsmnurSjPvmbXwteCfjwYY5W1BInB17yN2y+fM9kTgd8wO6aW6NKmUK/l67Ymn5jE6r12xIAQAh /wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMdgFAQAHCERTTVQ3AAETV2luQWxsQmFzaWNDb2RlUGFnZXMAEQVUaW1lcyBO ZXcgUm9tYW4AEQNTeW1ib2wAEQVDb3VyaWVyIE5ldwARBE1UIEV4dHJhABIACCEvRY9EL0FQ9BAP R19BUPIfHkFQ9BUPQQD0RfQl9I9CX0EA9BAPQ19BAPSPRfQqX0j0j0EA9BAPQPSPQX9I9BAPQSpf RF9F9F9F9F9BDwwBAAEAAQICAgIAAgABAQEAAwABAAQAAAoBAAIAgigAAgCDRgACAINVAAIAgikA AAAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDP/PD94bWwgdmVyc2lvbj0iMS4wIj8+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBUcmFu c2xhdG9yQDVANUBNYXRoTUwyIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpLnRkbEBNYXRoTUwgMi4wIChDbGlwYm9hcmQp QCAtLT48bWF0aCB4bWxucz0naHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMTk5OC9NYXRoL01hdGhNTCc+PG1y b3c+PG1vIHN0cmV0Y2h5PSdmYWxzZSc+KDwvbW8+PG1pPkY8L21pPjxtaT5VPC9taT48bW8gc3Ry ZXRjaHk9J2ZhbHNlJz4pPC9tbz48L21yb3c+PC9tYXRoPjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5D3BlQEVuZEA1QDVA IC0tPgAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMgYGAAAAAAAAOw== using the formula in (2) allows the resultant (FU) MathType@MTEF@5@5@+= feaahGart1ev3aqatCvAUfeBSjuyZL2yd9gzLbvyNv2CaerbuLwBLn hiov2DGi1BTfMBaeXatLxBI9gBaerbd9wDYLwzYbItLDharqqtubsr 4rNCHbGeaGqiVu0Je9sqqrpepC0xbbL8F4rqqrFfpeea0xe9Lq=Jc9 vqaqpepm0xbba9pwe9Q8fs0=yqaqpepae9pg0FirpepeKkFr0xfr=x fr=xb9adbaqaaeGaciGaaiaabeqaamaabaabaaGcbaGaaiikaiaadA eacaWGvbGaaiykaaaa@38F6@ R0lGODlhKAAVAPAAAP///wAAACwAAAAAKAAVAAACUYSPqcvtD6OcKqCAswV6c8xB3jGWFemM6Gqo IXsmnurSjPvmbXwteCfjwYY5W1BInB17yN2y+fM9kTgd8wO6aW6NKmUK/l67Ymn5jE6r12xIAQAh /wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMdgFAQAHCERTTVQ3AAETV2luQWxsQmFzaWNDb2RlUGFnZXMAEQVUaW1lcyBO ZXcgUm9tYW4AEQNTeW1ib2wAEQVDb3VyaWVyIE5ldwARBE1UIEV4dHJhABIACCEvRY9EL0FQ9BAP R19BUPIfHkFQ9BUPQQD0RfQl9I9CX0EA9BAPQ19BAPSPRfQqX0j0j0EA9BAPQPSPQX9I9BAPQSpf RF9F9F9F9F9BDwwBAAEAAQICAgIAAgABAQEAAwABAAQAAAoBAAIAgigAAgCDRgACAINVAAIAgikA AAAAIf8LTWF0aFR5cGUwMDP/PD94bWwgdmVyc2lvbj0iMS4wIj8+PCEtLSBNYXRoVHlwZUBUcmFu c2xhdG9yQDVANUBNYXRoTUwyIChDbGlwYm9hcmQpLnRkbEBNYXRoTUwgMi4wIChDbGlwYm9hcmQp QCAtLT48bWF0aCB4bWxucz0naHR0cDovL3d3dy53My5vcmcvMTk5OC9NYXRoL01hdGhNTCc+PG1y b3c+PG1vIHN0cmV0Y2h5PSdmYWxzZSc+KDwvbW8+PG1pPkY8L21pPjxtaT5VPC9taT48bW8gc3Ry ZXRjaHk9J2ZhbHNlJz4pPC9tbz48L21yb3c+PC9tYXRoPjwhLS0gTWF0aFR5D3BlQEVuZEA1QDVA IC0tPgAh/wtNYXRoVHlwZTAwMgYGAAAAAAAAOw== value to be used when applying the relevant sizing tables and design guidance in the applicable sections of AS/NZS 3500.2 in accordance with (1).
